quest.0448DC5884C8ED55.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of The Quartermaster&r.

Work with this &dEcho&r to discover your first &3Major Upgrade&r.

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo quartermaster&7.
quest.0448DC5884C8ED55.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d儲物將軍之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r協力探索出你的第一個&3主要升級&r吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo quartermaster&7」。

quest.0484D6030DF690BD.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby to find the &dEcho of The Machinist&r.

The &dMachinist&r specialises in calibrated engineering and moving contraptions.

Work with this &dEcho&r to unlock the &3Shadow Casing Upgrade&r for your &6World Engine&r.

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo machinist&7.
quest.0484D6030DF690BD.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d機械前輩之回聲&r了。

&d機械前輩&r將他的畢生精力投入於各種校準工程和移動裝置。

和這位&d回聲&r協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3暗影機殼升級&r吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo machinist&7」。

quest.04E68DA90DC83B45.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

You will still need to set up and connect a rotational power source close to the &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.04E68DA90DC83B45.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

你還是要自行在&6世界引擎&r附近設置並連接動能應力源上去。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.0D159FD643581C18.quest_desc.original:
The &dMachinist&r mentioned a forgotten and potentially &cdangerous&r &3Vault&r that should contain the alloy needed to make the &6World Engine's &3Shadow Casing Upgrade&r.

Dig throughout the &3Stone&r and &3Deepslate&r rings to locate the &3Vault&r using the compass provided by the &dMachinist&r.
quest.0D159FD643581C18.quest_desc.translation:
&d機械前輩&r提到了一座被遺忘且有潛在&c危險&r的&3寶庫&r：不過裡面可能有著我們製造&6世界引擎的&3暗影機殼升級&r所需的合金。

在&3石頭&r和&3深板岩&r環帶之間且挖且行，使用&d機械前輩&r給予你的羅盤找到那座&3寶庫&r吧。

quest.10DEA5CE1800F935.quest_desc.original:
&7&oSometimes things go wrong, and since Minecraft has no "Undo" button. We've added one for you.

If you accidentally break your &6World Engine&r machine block, clicking this button will replace it for you.

Keep in mind that this will wipe any of your existing settings and items inside the &6World Engine&r.
quest.10DEA5CE1800F935.quest_desc.translation:
&7&o有些事情不太對勁：由於 Minecraft 沒有「回退」選項，\n我們在這裡幫你加入了一個。

如果你不小心破壞掉了你的&6世界引擎&r機器方塊的話，點擊這個按鈕會重新放置一個。

請小心：這個按鈕會消除&6世界引擎&r內存有的各種資源和現有設定。

quest.15B551FCA8790707.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.15B551FCA8790707.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.17AC5EBEBDC124E9.quest_desc.original:
Using the &aEcho Encoder&r, you can Sneak + Right-click to convert the Villager into a &2Token&r.

This &2Token&r encodes the &aVillager&r in time, allowing you to place it down when needed.

The &aEcho Encoder&r only has so many charges, and will need to be recharged by placing it back into the &6World Engine&r.

The &dEcho of Guidance&r should now guide your next steps.
quest.17AC5EBEBDC124E9.quest_desc.translation:
手持&a回聲編碼工具&r時，對著村民「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以將他轉換成一塊&2令牌&r。

這塊&2令牌&r會馬上將&a村民&r編碼，以使你可以在需要時才將村民放出來。

&a回聲編碼工具&r只有短短幾次使用次數，若它的使用次數用完的話，就需要將它丟回&6世界引擎&r進行充能。

&d指引嚮導之回聲&r將指引你的下一步。

quest.18E10F15FD94258B.quest_desc.original:
Before you can create the casings used in for the &6World Engine&r, you'll need to have acquired &cLava&r and &dObsidian&r. 

If you haven't already, make sure you go speak to &6The Machinist&r to get an &bEntropy Manipulator&r to create lava.

&dObsidian&r is a strong enough material to support the strength of basic casings, but you'll need to press it into &aPlates&r first.
quest.18E10F15FD94258B.quest_desc.translation:
在你能夠製造出用在&6世界引擎&r上的機殼之前，你會需要先取得&c熔岩&r和&d黑曜石&r。

如果你覺得你無法取得，請先去和&6機械前輩&r交談並取得&b熵變機械手臂&r：用來製造熔岩。

&d黑曜石&r是一種堅固到足以支撐基礎機殼硬度的材料，但你會需要先將它壓成&a板&r。

quest.20168B6357665708.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.20168B6357665708.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.2140EAC255C3EA09.quest_desc.original:
The &aMultiblock Printer&f and &aMultiblock Validator&f are two tools that can help you build new structures and validate broken multiblocks.

The following pages will teach you how to use each item.
{@pagebreak}
The &aMultiblock Printer&f supports only certain structures, which you can find in &eJEI&r by searching “&aMultiblock Printer&r” and checking for the "&aⓘ&f Compatible" tag. 

Once you've gatherered the required blocks and cleared enough space for the multiblock, place down the &bController&r and Right-click it with the &aMultiblock Printer&r.

It will place blocks automatically using items from your inventory. 

If something blocks block placement or an item can’t be found in your inventory, the &aMultiblock Printer&f stops working and shows an error explaining the issue.
{@pagebreak}
The &aMultiblock Validator&f helps diagnose and maintain &eCustom Machinery&r multiblocks. 

Using it on a &bCustom Machinery Controller&r shows all &aInstalled Multiblock Modules&f. 

It can also re-align the World Engine automatically. 

You can also reset all multiblock cores. This action will &c&n&lNOT&r&c&n refund any lost items&r to errored cores, meaning any items in those cores will be effectively voided.
quest.2140EAC255C3EA09.quest_desc.translation:
&a多方塊建造小幫手&f與&a多方塊驗證工具&f是兩樣能協助你建造新結構，並修復損壞結構的便利工具。

接下來的頁面將教導你如何使用這兩項物品。
{@pagebreak}
&a多方塊建造小幫手&f僅支援部分特定的結構，

你可以在 &eJEI&r 中搜尋「&a多方塊建造小幫手&r」，

並檢查是否有標註「&aⓘ&f 相容」標籤來確認。

------------

一旦你集齊了所需的方塊，並為機器清出了足夠的空間，

先將&b控制器&r置於世界上，

並用&a多方塊建造小幫手&r對著控制器點擊右鍵，

工具會取用你物品欄內的物品，開始自動搭建多方塊結構。

------------

若放置過程中有障礙物阻擋，或是物品欄內缺少所需物品，

&a多方塊建造小幫手&r將停止運作，並顯示錯誤訊息並說明問題。

{@pagebreak}
&a多方塊驗證工具&f用於診斷與維護《&e自訂機器&r》的多方塊結構。

使用工具對著《&e自訂機器&r》的控制器點擊右鍵，

會顯示所有&a已安裝的多方塊結構升級&f。

它還能自動重新校準世界引擎。

------------

你還能用這項工具，重設多方塊結構的核心狀態。

注意：這項操作&c&n&l將不會&r&c&n退還錯誤核心中失去的物品&r，

這表示這些核心內的任何物品，都將被完全銷毀。

quest.22B94BDDC08B3FA9.quest_desc.original:
By reinforcing a &aBrass Casing&r with an &dObsidian Plate&r, you can create a casing strong enough to withstand the weight of a train.

This is a big step towards upgrading the &6World Engine&r!

Head back to the &dMachinist&r to show them your progress.
quest.22B94BDDC08B3FA9.quest_desc.translation:
透過使用&d黑曜石板&r強化&a黃銅機殼&r後，你可以製造出一種甚至能夠承受住列車的重量的堅固外殼。

在升級&6世界引擎&r這件事上，我們已經邁出了一大步！

回訪&d機械前輩&r，告訴他你的進展。

quest.2646D51DBAD8AD42.quest_desc.original:
&bCheck&f: Getting Shadow Casing

&bUnlocks&f: "Create Vault" Technically players can get there before
quest.2646D51DBAD8AD42.quest_desc.translation:
&bCheck&f: Getting Shadow Casing

&bUnlocks&f: "Create Vault" Technically players can get there before

quest.275C5A38C3231690.quest_desc.original: Once you've acquired the ability to produce &dSource&r, you should return to the &dMagician&r to learn how to infuse it into the &6World Engine&r.
quest.275C5A38C3231690.quest_desc.translation: 當你具有生產&d魔源&r的能力後，你是時候該回訪&d魔法長老&r，並向他學習該如何將它注入&6世界引擎&r之中了。

quest.2950D495BCF2D52D.quest_desc.original:
To upgrade the &6World Engine&r, you'll need to make some basic machines for processing materials.

To do this, you'll need some basic circuitry and metallic alloys. A &aMetallurgic Infuser&r would be a great machine for this.

You will also need a very durable machine casing to house the components.

["", {"text": "Note", "color": "yellow"},  ": Take a look at the ", {"text": "Power Generation", "color": "red", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "391B65CD04A90459"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Power chapter"}}, " chapter if you want some more early power options."]

You should return to the &dQuartermaster&r once you have completed his task.
quest.2950D495BCF2D52D.quest_desc.translation:
要升級&6世界引擎&r的話，你會需要做出一些用來處理材料的基礎機器。

你會需要一些基礎的電路材料和金屬合金才能完成這件事。&a冶金灌注機&r能夠很好的完成上述任務。

你也會需要一個非常堅固的機器外殼來容納內部組件。

["", {"text": "備註", "color": "yellow"},  "：如果你想要找一些早期的發電選項的話，請查看「", {"text": "發電", "color": "red", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "391B65CD04A90459"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往「能量」章節"}}, "」章節。"]

當你完成這項任務後，請去找&d儲物將軍&r回報任務。

quest.31CCB73669788855.quest_desc.original: Claiming this quest reward will set a waypoint at the &dEcho's &6Archive&r entrance.
quest.31CCB73669788855.quest_desc.translation: 領取該任務的任務獎勵會幫你在該&d回聲&r的&6檔案庫&r的入口處設置一個定位點。

quest.325826C9B71AD7E1.quest_desc.original:
&aBrass&r is an easy and malleable alloy to work with, and can be used to create some basic casings.

You'll need to combine these with &dObsidian Plates&r to create a stronger foundation.
quest.325826C9B71AD7E1.quest_desc.translation:
&a黃銅&r是一種易於加工且延展性高的合金，它可用於製作一些基礎的外殼。

你會需要將它們與&d黑曜石板&r結合來製造出更堅固的外殼。

quest.3917A0EC517F70E6.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.3917A0EC517F70E6.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.3E89531AEC1CF0DA.quest_desc.original: Once you've crafted all the required &aMachine Blocks&r, you should return to the &dQuartermaster&r to learn where they should go in the &6World Engine&r.
quest.3E89531AEC1CF0DA.quest_desc.translation: 當你合成出了足夠多的&a機器方塊&r後，你是時候該回訪&d儲物將軍&r，並向他學習該如何在&6世界引擎&r安裝這項升級了。

quest.3F81256B4E65076F.quest_desc.original:
The magical properties from the tree's logs can draw in the magical essence left behind in the world.

Craft the &aImbuement Chamber&r and convert &aLapis&r into a &dSource Gem&r.
quest.3F81256B4E65076F.quest_desc.translation:
至高木原木所蘊含的親魔特性，讓它們能夠自動吸收世界上的魔源。

合成一台&a灌注室&r，並將一顆&a青金石&r灌注成&d魔源寶石&r。

quest.40DDD27BA5E191FA.quest_desc.original:
This compass points to the location of a &3Vault.

&7&oThe Compass can be Sneak + Right-clicked when within 256 blocks from the vault to instantly teleport to the entrance!&r
quest.40DDD27BA5E191FA.quest_desc.translation:
這個羅盤指向一座&3寶庫&r的確切地點。

&7&o在寶庫的 256 格內手持羅盤「潛行 + 右鍵」\n可以快速傳送至寶庫入口！&r

quest.47D745A94C534B48.quest_desc.original:
With more &6Archives&r unlocked, it is time to explore the lobby and find the &dEcho of the Magician&r.

Work with this &dEcho&r to unlock the &3Source Upgrade&r for your &6World Engine&r.

&7&oYou may teleport directly to this Echo from anywhere in the lobby after meeting them using &e/echo magician&7.
quest.47D745A94C534B48.quest_desc.translation:
隨著更多&6檔案庫&r的解鎖，是時候探索大廳並找出&d魔法長老之回聲&r了。

和這位&d回聲&r協力為你的&6世界引擎&r解鎖&3魔源升級&r吧。

&7&o你可以在初訪這位回聲後，於大廳的任何地方使用下列指令傳送至他身旁：「&e/echo magician&7」。

quest.48005B47655AD525.quest_desc.original:
With the power of &dSource Gems&r, you can harness the flow of &dSource&r by making a &2Source Relay&r.

Using a &aDominion Wand&r, you can direct the flow of &dSource&r between jars.

By installing the &dSource&r &3World Engine Upgrade&r, you can direct &dSource&r into the engine to craft more magical items.
quest.48005B47655AD525.quest_desc.translation:
以&d魔源寶石&r之力，你可以製造一台&2魔源中繼器&r來駕馭&d魔源&r的流動。

你可以使用&a支配之杖&r引導各個容器之間的&d魔源&r流動。

當你安裝了&d魔源&r&3世界引擎升級&r之後，你就可以直接將&d魔源&r導入引擎內，合成更多魔法物品了。

quest.4C549866DEB8DB61.quest_desc.original:
To craft the &aMechanical Parts&r needed for the &3Machine Block Upgrade&r, you'll need some basic machines to make alloy wires and metal plates.

These plates are much easier to work with, and will reinforce the &2Machine Blocks&r to withstand &6World Engine&r crafts.

&eNote&r: These can be acquired using Productive Metalworks, Create, or Immersive Engineering.
quest.4C549866DEB8DB61.quest_desc.translation:
你會需要一些能夠製造合金導線和金屬板的機器，才能合成出&3機器方塊升級&r所需的&a機械零件&r。

金屬板的兼容性較好，並且能夠將&2機器方塊&r強化到&6世界引擎&r足以承受它的合成能量。

&e備註&r：你可以透過《高效率金屬製品》、《動力機械》或《沉浸工程》模組來完成這些。

quest.584B4C34CBF0E028.quest_desc.original:
While the &aImbuement Chamber&r can slowly draw in the magical essence from the world, it cannot create the &dSource&r that you need to upgrade the &6World Engine&r.

&dSource&r can be drawn from many different sources by using a &aSourcelink&r. There are many different options, but the &2Agronomic Sourcelink&r is a great starting point.

You'll also need a way to store the &dSource&r the link collects, which can easily be done by placing a &aSource Jar&r near the link.
quest.584B4C34CBF0E028.quest_desc.translation:
即使&a灌注室&r可以自動吸收世界上的魔力，它無法創造出你升級&6世界引擎&r所需的&d魔源&r。

&a魔源通道&r可以向各種不同來源吸收&d魔源&r。有許多不同的選項，但&2農藝魔源通道&r會是一個很好的開頭。

你也會需要一種能夠儲存&a魔源通道&r製造的&d魔源&r的方法：只要簡單地在它旁邊放一罐&a魔源罐&r即可。

quest.615D1A52ED3A9C78.quest_desc.original:
With the &2Worker Token&r, the &dEcho of Guidance&r has unlocked more &6Archives&r for you to visit.

Within them are new &dEchoes&r whose tasks will allow you to upgrade the &6World Engine&r! Make sure to go meet each one, as they might have a gift for you.

The &6World Engine&r has plenty of upgrades, with only a few being required to advance. Each tier requires at least 2 Upgrades to be completed by working with the &dEchoes&r.

&eNote&r: &dMajor Upgrades&r will be required, while &aMinor Upgrades&r are optional.
quest.615D1A52ED3A9C78.quest_desc.translation:
有了&2勞工令牌&r之後，&d指引嚮導之回聲&r解鎖了更多的&6檔案庫&r供你拜訪。

&6檔案庫&r中有著更多新的&d回聲&r：他們的任務會讓你逐步升級你的&6世界引擎&r！記得去拜訪每一位，有些可能為你準備了禮物。

&6世界引擎&r有著各式各樣的升級，但只有其中一些是進階必需的。每個階級都必須要至少完成兩項「要和&d回聲&r協力完成的升級」才能進階。

&e注意&r：&d大型升級&r為必須完成，&a小型升級&r則為可選項。

quest.62531896A7E58F55.quest_desc.original:
The alloys within the &3Vault&r are exactly what the &dMachinist&r talked about needing for the &6World Engine&r upgrade.

Make those upgrade materials and head back to the &dEcho&r.

&eNote&r: You'll need to provide Rotational Power to the &6World Engine&r through the &aEncased Chain Drive&r below it.
quest.62531896A7E58F55.quest_desc.translation:
在&3寶庫&r中找到的合金真的是&d機械前輩&r提到的那種：作為&6世界引擎&r升級必需的合金。

製作出這些升級材料並回訪&d機械前輩&r。

&e備註&r：你會需要透過&6世界引擎&r正下方的&a鏈式傳動箱&r將動能應力輸送進去。

quest.6B391D0B32AF8529.quest_desc.original: After you've crafted enough &2Shadow Steel&r, you should return to the &dMachinist&r to learn where to place it in the &6World Engine&r.
quest.6B391D0B32AF8529.quest_desc.translation: 當你合成出了足夠多的&2暗影機殼&r後，你是時候該回訪&d機械尊者&r，並向他學習該如何在&6世界引擎&r安裝這項升級了。

quest.715F30D0A9B79DD7.quest_desc.original:
The &6World Engine's &3Machine Block Upgrade&r unlocks several new crafts, including one of the best tools you can make for getting around.

The &aExplorer's Compass&r can help you locate any structure in the pack, including mysterious &3Vaults&r!
quest.715F30D0A9B79DD7.quest_desc.translation:
&6世界引擎&3機器方塊升級&r解鎖了許多新的合成配方，包含一個探索世界時最有用的工具：

&a探索者羅盤&r可以幫助你定位本模組包中的任何結構，像是那些神秘的&3寶庫&r！

quest.76673B8374630924.quest_desc.original:
Submitting the blocks required for the &3Upgrade&f and claiming its rewards will automatically assemble your team's &6World Engine&r.

&eNote&f: Any blocks placed where an upgrade should go will be voided.
quest.76673B8374630924.quest_desc.translation:
提交該&3升級&r所需的方塊並領取該獎勵會自動將它組裝到你們隊伍的&6世界引擎&r之中。

&e備註&f：任何放置在該升級所需位置的所有方塊都會被銷毀。

quest.79EB0239FE299185.quest_desc.original:
According to the &dQuartermaster&r, you now have everything you need to craft the &2World Engine Machine Frames&r in the &6World Engine&r.

You'll need a bunch of these to restore some of the &6World Engine's&r functions, allowing you to craft more complex items!
quest.79EB0239FE299185.quest_desc.translation:
據&d儲物將軍&r所述，你已取得了合成&6世界引擎&r的&2世界引擎機器框架&r所需的所有材料了。

你會需要很多才能復原&6世界引擎&r的功能：這樣你就可以合成更多更複雜的物品了！

quest.7D1FB9A40B5CAE97.quest_desc.original:
&bCheck&f: Getting Worker Token

&bUnlocks&f: Doors to T1 Echoes and Chapter 1
quest.7D1FB9A40B5CAE97.quest_desc.translation:
&bCheck&f: Getting Worker Token

&bUnlocks&f: Doors to T1 Echoes and Chapter 1

quest.7F7C0B1523AA28C4.quest_desc.original:
The first task from the &dMagician&r is to unearth magical trees from the world.

You should work together with an Expert or Master &2Archaeologist&r in an &aUnearther&r to dig up these magical saplings up.

["If you're more of the explorer type, you may also find some magical resources in the ", {"text": "Arcane Grove", "color": "dark_green", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "066B47D2AB72355C"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Arcane Grove Quest"}}, ". Use the compass provided by the ", {"text": "Magician", "color": "light_purple"}, " to guide you."]

If you're planning to engage the enemies within the &2Grove&r, make sure to equip at least &bDiamond-level&r gear. &cYou've been warned!&r

You should return to the &dMagician&r once you have completed his task.
quest.7F7C0B1523AA28C4.quest_desc.translation:
來自&d魔法長老&r的第一項任務是發掘出世界上的魔法樹種。

你需要一個「專家」或「大師」級的&2考古學家&r，幫你在&a資源發掘站&r中&a發掘&r出這些魔法樹苗。

["若你是一位喜歡探險的玩家，你也可以在「", {"text": "秘法源林", "color": "dark_green", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "066B47D2AB72355C"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往「秘法源林」任務"}}, "」中找到至高木。使用", {"text": "魔法長老", "color": "light_purple"}, "給予你的羅盤來定位該結構。"]

如果你想要對抗&2源林&r中的敵人的話，建議至少穿上&b鑽石級別&r的盔甲。&c你已被警告過了！&r

當你完成此項任務後，記得回到&d魔法長老&r處。

task.5B3A2DEB3DFBA285.title.translation: 與&d指引嚮導之回聲&r交談
